name: mythosforge-video
description: Generate a short video from a text prompt (optionally image-to-video from a first frame) via Replicate. Bring your own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN. No wallet, no payment.

image.note: optional first-frame image (path or URL) -> image-to-video

image-field.note: image-input key for a --model not in the built-in map (e.g. image, first_frame_image, start_image)

duration.note: optional model duration param, integer only (-1 = auto on Seedance); sent when provided

resolution.note: optional model resolution param, e.g. 720p (only sent when provided)

model.note: override the Replicate video model slug

output: JSON line on stdout: { ok, prompt, image, path, bytes }. Read `path` for the written .mp4.

runtimes.tool-use-llm: hand tool-schema.json (openai or anthropic block) to the model; host runs invoke on the tool call. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Bankr LLM Gateway, Surplus, and any function-calling model.
